inputs.text: Medium shot, fixed lens, 3D cartoon rendering style. The central subject in the picture is a cartoon - style little boy. He has short black hair, with two tender green leaves growing on top of his head, looking cute and playful. His eyes are closed, his cheeks have a faint blush, his mouth is slightly pursed, and his expression is quiet and peaceful. There is a "Z" symbol indicating sleep next to him, conveying a state of sound sleep. He is wearing a blue shirt with white buttons, paired with black pants and black shoes, with a simple yet childlike overall look. There is the English word "sleep" at the top of the picture and the Chinese name "Deva" at the bottom. The background is a plain light gray color, making the cartoon character stand out more, and the whole picture creates a quiet and cute atmosphere.
